MemoryMedia.title: MemoryMedia
MemoryMedia.description: An image or video representing a curated snapshot of the friendship scrap book.

url.description: Data URI, cloud asset URL, or Unsplash source link

description.description: A heartfelt story or summary attached to the memory

Song.title: Song
Song.description: A musical audio track custom curated for the surprise journey background atmosphere.

url.description: Live playable audio asset stream URL

isSynthesized.description: True if compiled procedurally via native sound wave oscillators

Chapter.title: Chapter
Chapter.description: A storyline block outlining major memory phases, notes of gratitude, and interactive visuals.

text.description: Markdown or raw narrative content expressing friendship memories

photoIds.description: List of associated memory image IDs

videoIds.description: List of associated memory video clip IDs

isGlassMessage.description: Style toggle for frosted glowing background visual theme overrides

hasTrigger.description: Trigger code for real-time physics celebration overlays

AlbumState.title: AlbumState
AlbumState.description: The unified state of the memory scrapbook containing all customized texts and media lists.

mediaItems.description: Full collection of image and video memory nodes

chapters.description: Story chapters metadata and narrative overrides

/scrapbook/{docId}.description: Saves live published configurations and staging draft states of Satyam's custom gift.
